mapper.insert: insert into `orders` (order_no, user_id, total_price, status, create_time) values (#{orderNo}, #{userId}, #{totalPrice}, #{status}, NOW())
mapper.update: update `orders` set order_no = #{orderNo}, user_id = #{userId}, total_price = #{totalPrice}, status = #{status}, create_time = NOW(), is_deleted = #{isDeleted} where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select * from `orders` where user_id = #{userId} and is_deleted = 0
